content: 🚀 Apple just unveiled the new Mac! Unbelievable performance — M4 chip is a total game changer. I've been using it for a week and I can't go back. The battery life alone is worth the upgrade. Who else is eyeing the new Mac? #NewMac #Apple #M4Chip
